creator: tijl@FreeBSD.org
text: I'm not sure this is fixable.  xml2-config cannot distinguish between static and dynamic linking like pkgconfig ("pkgconf --libs libxml-2.0" versus "pkgconf --static --libs libxml-2.0") so it always has to return all libraries.  You'll have to make net/asterisk use pkgconfig somehow.  For instance, by replacing that definition of LIBXML2_LIB with `pkgconf --libs libxml-2.0`.
